zh.lifeSummary: 當Martha de Ridel於大約1137年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾豪頓時，她的父親Aschetil de Ridell22歲，母親Elena de Morville18歲。她於大約1166年與Sewallis Eatington在英國瓦維其可爾艾廷頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭德比夏爾莎莉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Martha de Ridel于大约1137年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾豪頓时，她的父亲Aschetil de Ridell22岁，母亲Elena de Morville18岁。她于大约1166年与Sewallis Eatington在英国瓦維其可爾艾廷頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世在英国英格兰德比夏爾莎莉。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ridel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Middlesex): from the Middle English female personal name Rimilde, Rimilda, from Old English or Old Norse Rimhild, perhaps derived from hrīm ‘frost’ + hild ‘battle’, or more likely from the corresponding Old Norse words; a (H)rimhild was the wife of Knut Sveinson of Jadar, according to Snorri Sturluson in Heimskringla. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Rimmel
meanings: English (Middlesex): variant of   Rimel  . This surname is now rare in Britain.
German: variant of Rimmele, from Rümelin, a pet form of the ancient Germanic personal name Ruombald, a compound of hruom ‘glory’ + balt ‘bold, brave’.

nameMeanings.name: Martha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, of Aramaic rather than Hebrew origin, meaning ‘lady’. It was borne by the sister of Lazarus and Mary of Bethany (John 11:1). According to Luke 10:38, when Jesus visited the house of Mary and Martha, Mary sat at his feet, listening to him, while Martha ‘was cumbered about much serving’, so that she complained to Jesus, ‘Lord, dost thou not care that my sister hath left me to serve alone?’ For this reason, the name Martha has always been associated with hard domestic work, as opposed to the contemplative life.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Martha de Ridel was born about 1137, in Haughton, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Aschetil de Ridell, was 22 and her mother, Elena de Morville, was 18. She married Sewallis Eatington about 1166, in Ettington, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died in Shirley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Martha de Ridel est née environ 1137, à Haughton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Aschetil de Ridell, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elena de Morville, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sewallis Eatington environ 1166, à Ettington, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée à Shirley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Martha de Ridel um 1137 in Haughton, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Aschetil de Ridell 22 und ihre Mutter Elena de Morville 18. Sie hat um 1166 in Ettington, Warwickshire, England Sewallis Eatington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb in Shirley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Martha de Ridel è nata il circa 1137 nel Haughton, Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, Aschetil de Ridell, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Elena de Morville, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Sewallis Eatington circa 1166, nel Ettington, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel Shirley, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Martha de Ridelが約1137年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアハウトンで生まれた時，父Aschetil de Ridellは22歳，母Elena de Morvilleは18歳であった。約1166年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアエッティントンでSewallis Eatingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアシュイルリーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Martha de Ridel(이)가 대략 1137년 영국 노틴그함실르 하우그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Aschetil de Ridell(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elena de Morville(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 대략 1166년 영국 워윅실르 틴그턴에서 Sewallis Eatington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 실를리에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Martha de Ridel nasceu aproximadamente 1137, em Haughton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Aschetil de Ridell, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Elena de Morville, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Sewallis Eatington aproximadamente 1166, em Ettington, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu em Shirley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Martha de Ridel родилась около 1137 г. в местности хотон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Aschetil de Ridell было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elena de Morville, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sewallis Eatington около 1166 г. в местности эттингтон, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла в местности ширли, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Martha de Ridel nació aproximadamente 1137, en Haughton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Aschetil de Ridell, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Elena de Morville, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Sewallis Eatington aproximadamente 1166, en Ettington, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en Shirley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
